_note: Copied verbatim from data/fd-templates/base_appr/meta.json (see README.md in this dir). The identity fields above (locator/pnr_id/ticket/leg_id/carrier/flight/route/date/surname/first/email) are the ones seed.render.render_case actually string-rewrites and are feed-agnostic. FD's 'expected'/'covers_sits' keys were dropped here (soc doesn't have a cash amount or FD-SIT coverage IDs) rather than left in with stale FD values.
